creator: comp@kpfa.org
text:
Anders Nordby wrote:
> Hi,
>
> I have the same problem in FreeBSD 6.1-RELEASE, which runs smbfs to
> mount filesystems off Samba on another FreeBSD server.
>
> Any progress on this problem?
>
> Bye,
>
>   
I'm still getting the message

    Jun  1 11:49:39 free156 kernel: smb_maperror: Unmapped error 1:158
    Jun  1 11:59:39 free156 last message repeated 2 times

I have been ignoring it, looking forward to trying the next Samba 
upgrade on the
server hosting my file shares.

My workstation is at FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p3 and Open Office is 2.2.

I'm also getting

    Jun  1 11:41:29 xxxxxxxx smbd[95359]: [2007/06/01 11:41:29, 0] 
smbd/nttrans.c:call_nt_transact_ioctl(2332)
    Jun  1 11:41:29 xxxxxxxx smbd[95359]:   
call_nt_transact_ioctl(0x280004): Currently not implemented.

in the server's /var/log/messages when someone prints to one of the 
Samba printers. The server
is at FreeBSD 6.1-RELEASE-p11 and smbd version 3.0.23c and the 
workstations are WinXP and Win2000,
using the print drivers on the local machines.


Dan Albers
